e employed. Mercury is no
doubt powerful in a way as he is in the 2nd with the Sun, the
9th lord. But as he is also with Rahu in the Rasi much
success is not shown in speculation. Some wealth through
chance games may be expected by prudent investments. The
disposition of the 2nd lord (in the Navamsa) in the 10th is
good in its own way: the association with the Sun lord of the
12th is indicative of some sudden financial loss. Financial
losses in this case may also happen through the fraudulent
conduct of others. Gains from totally unexpected sources are
also likely. Investments in coal, shipping and the like would
also prove profitable. The 12th lord's association in Amsa
denotes waste, sometimes over-liberal tendencies and losses
through carelessness, particularly in the major period of
Mars. As Mercury is with Rahu without any relieving
features some loss is foreseen through bursting of
speculative bubbles.
